requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 and DGCA Dangerous Goods Controls
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3 及 DGCA 危险品控制
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3 及 DGCA 危險品控制

summary.en: Lithium cells, batteries, and power banks are dangerous goods for transport. For air carriage to or within India, DGCA dangerous-goods rules and guidance apply alongside ICAO Technical Instructions and airline acceptance rules. Exporters should hold UN 38.3 test evidence for the exact cell/pack, classify shipments as UN 3480 or UN 3481 as applicable, prepare the dangerous-goods declaration or excepted-section documentation, and confirm packaging, marks, labels, state-of-charge limits, and operator acceptance before tendering cargo.
summary.zh: 锂电芯、电池及移动电源在运输上属于危险货物。空运至印度或在印度境内空运时，DGCA 危险品规则和指引与 ICAO 技术细则及航空公司接收规则共同适用。出口商应持有对应电芯/电池组的 UN 38.3 测试证据，按适用情况将货物分类为 UN 3480 或 UN 3481，准备危险品申报或例外条款文件，并在交运前确认包装、标记、标签、荷电状态限制及承运人接收要求。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯、電池及行動電源在運輸上屬於危險貨物。空運至印度或在印度境內空運時，DGCA 危險品規則和指引與 ICAO 技術細則及航空公司接收規則共同適用。出口商應持有對應電芯/電池組的 UN 38.3 測試證據，按適用情況將貨物分類為 UN 3480 或 UN 3481，準備危險品申報或例外條款文件，並在交運前確認包裝、標記、標籤、荷電狀態限制及承運人接收要求。

standards_or_laws: Aircraft Act and Aircraft Rules / carriage of dangerous goods rules administered by DGCA — mandatory legal controls for air carriage
DGCA dangerous goods circulars, permissions, and operator guidance — mandatory where applicable to air transport acceptance
UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — transport test benchmark used for lithium cells and batteries
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air — international air transport requirements

summary.en: Chinese exporters usually obtain UN 38.3 reports for air or sea shipments and prepare dangerous-goods documents under CAAC, IMDG, and carrier rules. This is a strong starting point, but India-bound air cargo must still meet DGCA and airline acceptance controls, including local permissions, documentation format, and operator handling restrictions where applicable.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常已为空运或海运取得 UN 38.3 报告，并依据 CAAC、IMDG 和承运人规则准备危险品文件。这是良好起点，但发往印度的空运货物仍须满足 DGCA 及航空公司接收控制，包括适用的本地许可、文件格式和承运人操作限制。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常已為空運或海運取得 UN 38.3 報告，並依據 CAAC、IMDG 和承運人規則準備危險品文件。這是良好起點，但發往印度的空運貨物仍須滿足 DGCA 及航空公司接收控制，包括適用的本地許可、文件格式和承運人操作限制。

standards_or_laws: CAAC dangerous goods requirements for China air transport
UN 38.3 test report and test summary used for lithium battery transport
IMDG Code for sea transport where applicable

gap.en: The main gap is logistics acceptance rather than product-market certification. A BIS registration does not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence, and UN 38.3 does not replace BIS registration. For India air shipments, align DGCA/ICAO documents with the exact battery type, watt-hour rating, package count, state of charge, emergency contact, and carrier route restrictions.
gap.zh: 主要差距在物流接收而非产品市场认证。BIS 注册不能替代 UN 38.3 运输证据，UN 38.3 也不能替代 BIS 注册。印度空运应将 DGCA/ICAO 文件与准确电池类型、瓦时额定值、包件数量、荷电状态、应急联系人及承运人航线限制对齐。
gap.zht: 主要差距在物流接收而非產品市場認證。BIS 登記不能替代 UN 38.3 運輸證據，UN 38.3 也不能替代 BIS 登記。印度空運應將 DGCA/ICAO 文件與準確電池類型、瓦時額定值、包件數量、荷電狀態、應急聯絡人及承運人航線限制對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal and operator acceptance controls apply for dangerous-goods air carriage under DGCA/ICAO rules where applicable; UN 38.3 is a transport test benchmark and acceptance evidence, not an India market-access certificate.
mandatory_status.cn: China-origin UN 38.3 evidence is normally required for transport but must match the India-bound shipment and carrier route.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep transport and market access separate: UN 38.3 / DGCA controls govern shipment acceptance, while BIS CRS governs India market placement for notified products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应区分运输与市场准入：UN 38.3 / DGCA 控制决定运输接收，BIS CRS 决定被通知产品在印度市场投放。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應區分運輸與市場准入：UN 38.3 / DGCA 控制決定運輸接收，BIS CRS 決定被通知產品在印度市場投放。

source.publisher: Directorate General of Civil Aviation, Government of India
